calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-31-2025 Vacated

Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RAJ KOHLI's Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Complaint.

Plaintiff Raj Kohli's motion for leave to amend his First Amended Complaint is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

Motion For Leave To Amend First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-06-2024 Continued To Dec-17-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF RAJ KOHLI's Motion for Leave To Amend First Amended Complaint.

Appearances (in person):
Dyan Hackett, Esq., Law Office of, (415)410-9931, for Plaintiff.

Michael C. Hughes, Esq., Deputy San Francisco City Attorney, (415) 554-3867, for Defendant.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court vacates its tentative ruling and the matter is continued to Law and Motion on Dec-17-2024 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 301.

Counsel for Plaintiff is to prepare an order regarding the continuance and submit it via email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Court Reporter: Brianna Rudd; CSR: 13668; T: 415.981.3498. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Set For Trial On Feb-03-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
